title: Mob Head Camouflage
description: Wear a mob head, mob ignores you.
body:
## Ever felt that mob heads in Minecraft are just expensive decorations?

**Not anymore!**

---
**Mob Head Camouflage introduces a logical and immersive mechanic that allows players to blend in with their enemies. By wearing the severed head of a mob, you effectively "trick" that specific species into thinking you are one of them**
